title: Colonies Maid Citizen
description: A touhoulittlemaid and minecolonies addon mod,can make minecolonies's citizen can use touhoulittlemaid's maid model renderer.
body:
A touhoulittlemaid and minecolonies addon mod,can make minecolonies's citizen can use touhoulittlemaid's maid model renderer.

Mod only does one thing: it renders the citizens' skins of the colony to use the touhou little maid's skin rendering, just rendering, without any related features of the maid.

When you enable the town rendering, you will see many "maid citizens" in your town.

Enable Before：
![Enable Before ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/968550dc094fd4885c07adeb16a9aef4001242c5_0.webp)
Enable After：
![Enable After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a886f847496cf7f59c681382a6314c966385ee1d_0.webp)

Usage:
There are three configurations now:
1. Global configuration, change it in the configuration file.
2. The second one is the town configuration (default is off): Use the module item "npc tool" and shift right-click your citizen to toggle the rendering of the town's maid model.
3. The third one is the configuration of individual citizens: Use the mod item to right-click residents just like changing maid skins.
- That is, the default is not to use the maid model rendering. You need to manually enable the town configuration.
- Another point is: If there were already existing citizens before you enable the town configuration, you will see that your previous citizens are all Hakurei Reimu, but this cannot be solved(Rather, logically, I don't know how to deal with it)...
  
Rule chain:
global configuration - > town configuration - > single citizen configuration; This is the only way to render using the maid model

Tips:
When you turn on the town configuration, all citizens will be rendered using the maid model. So those who don't want to use the maid model to render have to manually turn it off themselves...
